name: Claude CLI Bridge
description: On-demand Claude Code CLI process management via stream-json. Start, communicate with, and stop Claude CLI sessions.

systemPrompt.label: System Prompt
systemPrompt.help: System prompt for the Claude CLI session.

idleTimeoutMinutes.label: Idle Timeout (minutes)
idleTimeoutMinutes.help: Auto-kill the CLI process after this many minutes of inactivity. Default: 10.

model.label: Model
model.help: Claude model to use (e.g. claude-opus-4-6). Leave empty for default.
